items.title: Journey Recovery Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Premium Long-Haul Airline operations.

items.title: Reservation Platform Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Premium Long-Haul Airline.

items.title: Airline Platform Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Premium Long-Haul Airline stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
